regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces sustained military pressure from U.S. and Israeli operations following collapsed ceasefire negotiations in April 2026, with the regime consolidating power through hardline succession appointments and internal security crackdowns while managing military degradation and economic collapse from Strait disruptions.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Post-ceasefire repression surge including over 700 arrests, IRGC/Basij raids across Iranian cities, and fatal shootings in Khomein and Hamedan on July 2, 2026, indicating regime consolidating control through internal security operations amid military losses.
